# qt

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `qt`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `qt.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Qt 5 and 6 configuration. |
| `qt.kde.settings` | `attribute set of (KDE option value)` | A set of values to be modified by kwriteconfig6 . |
| `qt.kvantum.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Kvantum configuration. |
| `qt.kvantum.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of section of a kvconfig file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string) or a non-empty list of them)` | Global configuration settings written to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/Kvantum/kvantum.kvconfig . |
| `qt.kvantum.themes` | `list of package` | Theme packages to install to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/Kvantum/ . |
| `qt.platformTheme` | `null or one of “gtk”, “gtk3”, “gnome”, “adwaita”, “lxqt”, “qtct”, “kde”, “kde6” or (submodule)` | Deprecated. Use qt.platformTheme.name instead. |
| `qt.qt5ctSettings` | `null or (attribute set of section of an INI file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string) or a non-empty list of them))` | Qtct configuration. Writes settings to qt5ct/qt5ct.conf file. Lists will be translated to comma-separated strings. Fonts must be quoted (see example). |
| `qt.qt6ctSettings` | `null or (attribute set of section of an INI file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string) or a non-empty list of them))` | Qtct configuration. Writes settings to qt6ct/qt6ct.conf file. Lists will be translated to comma-separated strings. Fonts must be quoted (see example). |
| `qt.style.name` | `null or string` | Style to use for Qt5/Qt6 applications. Case-insensitive. |
| `qt.style.package` | `null or package or list of package` | Theme package to be used in Qt5/Qt6 applications. Auto-detected from qt.style.name if possible. See its documentation for available options. |
| `qt.useGtkTheme` | | |
